results.title: Stock Market Today, April 30: Caterpillar's Jump After Earnings Helped Fuel Surge in Dow | The Motley Fool
Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P Live Updates for April 30 - Bloomberg
Mag 7 Momentum: Stocks Up on Earnings, Data, Oil

results.summary: S&P 500 rose 1.02% to 7,209.01 (first close above 7,200). Nasdaq jumped 0.89% to 24,892.31. Dow added 790.33 points (+1.62%) to 49,652.14. Caterpillar +10% on earnings beat; Meta -9% on AI capex hike ($125B-$145B); Eli Lilly +7% on Q1 beat and raised guidance.
